action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 8 achieved a new best test spearman of 0.7175. The architecture with 2 CNN layers (kernel 7) and mean pooling is very effective. Analysis: The mutated region in the AAV capsid is 28 amino acids long (positions 561-588). Currently, the CNN has a receptive field of 19 (kernel 7, dilation 2). If we increase the dilation of the second CNN layer to 4, the receptive field becomes 31 (7 + 6*4), which perfectly covers the entire mutated region. This allows the CNN to capture complex interactions between any mutations in that region. I will also slightly lower the ESM learning rate to 5e-5 to regularize the fine-tuning and train for 10 epochs. Decision: Update model.py to use dilation=4 in the second CNN layer. Update train.py to use lr=5e-5 for ESM and train for 10 epochs. Submit for evaluation.
